services/git-bridge/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the release flag to target Java 21.
services/git-bridge/pom.xml.why_exists: The source/target flags are deprecated in newer compiler plugin versions and do not enforce the target bytecode version as strictly as the release flag; using release=21 is required to compile for Java 21.

services/git-bridge/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
services/git-bridge/pom.xml.why_exists: Guava 19.0 does not support Java 21 and may cause runtime errors or incompatibilities with newer JDK internal APIs.
